title: missing scenes
wikitext:
[]: "missing scenes"             Quote Post by V » Sun Sep 28, 2008 1:07 pm what are scenes that we know were NEVER made, but were scripted at some point? I.e. we have seen those storyboards for the abandoned scene in End of Eva showing the Class 2-A kids getting shipped off, the ruined school, and playing basketball I seem to remember someone mentioning that for episode 11, there was an abandoned scene where the idea was that we see Aoba with his guitar, and the idea was that at the end when they're stargazing they'd have an actual little campout and Aoba would be playing campfire songs and Toji & Co would be there as well. ***I have actually seen like a still shot of this. **however, I suspect much of this may actually be video-game material (made by Gainax but not-canon) that someone mistook for the real thing anyone know the real deal anything else?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 28, 2008 4:05 pm IIRC, Misato and Ritsuko were supposed to have a battle royale at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Sun Sep 28, 2008 4:58 pm ^ What a pity that was never produced.... :(

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Sep 28, 2008 5:31 pm Lucretius wrote: IIRC, Misato and Ritsuko were supposed to have a battle royale at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 28, 2008 5:49 pm According to some disgruntled former Gainax employee whose anti-Anno rant was posted on eva otaku, Misato and Ritsuko were supposed to "die fighting each other." They have a pretty nasty confrontation in episode 25; maybe it was supposed to happen then?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 28, 2008 5:54 pm Lucretius wrote: a pretty nasty confrontation in episode 25

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 28, 2008 6:24 pm Link here: http://www.evaotaku.com/html/kaibunsho.html

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 28, 2008 6:44 pm I have this one tape with a great deleted scene that involves Asuka, Kaworu, and a lot of red wine.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 28, 2008 7:29 pm Replace "Kaworu" with "Misato" and we have a winner.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 28, 2008 11:42 pm The only scenes of that sort that I can remember that we KNOW existed at some point (not based on rumors or the very dubious kaibunsho) include: -Toji's basketball "game" at the beginning of EoE, which was scripted and storyboarded, but cut. This scene would have been significant as it would be apparent that Toji still had both arms, as well as the fact being revealed that they and Hikari were to be transported to Germany. You can see the storyboards on the Japanese EoE DVD, I believe. -Toji talking to his younger sister at the hospital. This was in Evangelion Original . -A scene in episode 24 of Kaworu talking to Gendo. Kaworu says that NERV HQ is a "cathedral" that Gendo built for his wife, which is true in Kaworu's cryptic manner of speaking. This was mentioned in "an old issue of June ", according to Olivier Hague. -A few things here and there were removed such as Toji mentioning his mother working late instead of being dead, which was changed for obvious reasons, and SEELE's name being changed to ESSENE. EDIT: Oh yeah, and how can I forget the two alternate endings for EoE? Also, I'm not sure if Sadamoto's two other ends of the series count, but they're extant.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Sep 29, 2008 12:14 am NAveryW wrote: -Toji talking to his younger sister at the hospital. This was in Evangelion Original .

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 29, 2008 12:44 am V wrote: What is "Evangelion Original"? Any more info on this scene? Please elaborate.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 29, 2008 1:11 am One more key difference that I remember is that Unit 01 was originally supposed to rip out the S2 Engine and stick it into her chest instead of eating it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 29, 2008 1:14 am Action_Bastard wrote: One more key difference that I remember is that Unit 01 was originally supposed to rip out the S2 Engine and stick it into her chest instead of eating it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 29, 2008 1:19 am I wouldn't mind it either way for Webuild, it's going to look better anyway. But this tangent is more for the Rebuild section, so I will stop there.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 29, 2008 1:23 am V wrote: What is June? (or Olivier Hague for that matter).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 29, 2008 5:51 am NAveryW wrote: Hopefully you'll be able to see it in Rebuild . That's one of the things I'm hoping for from it.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Sep 29, 2008 9:13 am Mr. Tines wrote: V wrote: What is June? (or Olivier Hague for that matter).

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Sep 29, 2008 11:29 am I got the first Evangelion Original on eBay for $15.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Sep 29, 2008 12:19 pm nowadays they fetch maybe $150 they're out of print so they only increase in value
